reasoning: CompanyName is the official registered name of the company in the Myanmar registry
AltName contains the company name in Burmese/local language script as shown in records 2 and 3
RegistrationNumber is the current official registration number assigned by Myanmar registry
PriorRegistrationNumber contains the old registration number from the previous system before re-registration
HoldingCompanyRegNumber contains the registration number of the parent/holding company
HoldingCompanyName contains the name of the parent/holding company
CompanyType contains the human-readable description of the legal form (e.g., 'Overseas Corporation', 'Private Company Limited by Shares') which is preferred over CompanyTypeId
Status contains the current life-cycle status of the company (e.g., 'Registered', 'Not Yet Re-Registered')
This is the Myanmar company registry, so registration country is always Myanmar (MM)
RegistrationDateFormatted contains the date the company was registered in DD/MM/YYYY format
Activities array contains business activity descriptions which describe what the company does. Join all activity types to capture full scope of business activities
TotalShares represents the total number of shares issued, which relates to share capital
ShareCurrency contains the ISO currency code for the share capital (e.g., 'MMK')
RegisteredOfficeAddress object contains Street1, Street2, Street3 fields for the business/registered office address street components
RegisteredOfficeAddress.City contains the city for the registered office/business address
RegisteredOfficeAddress.Country contains the country for the business address
